message:
fix(ci): add duckdb Python package for proper 3-way benchmark comparison

The benchmark code checks for `duckdb` as a Python module, not the CLI.
Changed from installing DuckDB CLI to installing the duckdb Python package
so all three engines (LanceQL, DuckDB, Polars) are properly benchmarked.

files.patch:
@@ -50,8 +50,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: |
-          brew install duckdb
-          pip install polars numpy pyarrow pylance
+          pip install polars numpy pyarrow pylance duckdb
 
       - name: Generate benchmark data
         run: |
@@ -184,11 +183,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: |
-          # Install DuckDB
-          curl -LO https://github.com/duckdb/duckdb/releases/download/v1.1.3/duckdb_cli-linux-amd64.zip
-          unzip duckdb_cli-linux-amd64.zip
-          sudo mv duckdb /usr/local/bin/
-          pip install polars numpy pyarrow pylance
+          pip install polars numpy pyarrow pylance duckdb
 
       - name: Generate benchmark data
         run: |
